title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: man-pages bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for man-pages is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The man-pages package provides man (manual) pages from the Linux Documentation Project (LDP).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): man-pages: Add update for RWF_ATOMIC [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-87647)  man-pages: Errata work on RHEL-10.1.Z (2025:155154) (JIRA:RHEL-120495)  man-page: madvise(2) can return -EBUSY on MADV_SOFT_OFFLINE requests [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115501)  man-pages: The rto_min route attribute does not take effect unless "lock" is also set (JIRA:RHEL-86830)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for man-pages is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The man-pages package provides man (manual) pages from the Linux Documentation Project (LDP).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): man-pages: Add update for RWF_ATOMIC [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-87647)  man-pages: Errata work on RHEL-10.1.Z (2025:155154) (JIRA:RHEL-120495)  man-page: madvise(2) can return -EBUSY on MADV_SOFT_OFFLINE requests [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115501)  man-pages: The rto_min route attribute does not take effect unless "lock" is also set (JIRA:RHEL-86830)
